summary: Completed testing of Daily Analytics Drill-Down feature (Iteration 9). All backend API tests pass (5/5). Frontend drill-down dialog works correctly with all components rendering properly.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/analytics/daily-detail?date=2026-03-31 returns correct data (100 koli, 2 completed jobs, 2 operators)
Backend API: GET /api/analytics/daily-detail?date=2026-04-07 returns empty/zero data for day with no production
Backend API: Invalid date format returns error message 'Geçersiz tarih formatı. YYYY-MM-DD kullanın.'
Backend API: Missing date parameter returns 422 validation error
Backend API: Future date returns empty data
Frontend: Management login with 'buse11993' works
Frontend: Analiz tab shows 'Detay için güne tıklayın' hint text
Frontend: Clicking bar in Günlük Üretim chart opens daily detail dialog
Frontend: Dialog title shows Turkish date format '31 Mart 2026 Salı'
Frontend: Summary card 'Toplam Koli' shows 100
Frontend: Summary card 'Tamamlanan' shows 2 completed jobs
Frontend: Summary card 'Başlayan' shows 2 started jobs
Frontend: Summary card 'Operatör' shows 2 operators
Frontend: Summary card 'Kısmi Üretim' shows 0
Frontend: Summary card 'Defo (kg)' shows 0
Frontend: Machine breakdown pie chart renders (yellow pie for 33x33 ICM)
Frontend: Operator performance horizontal bar chart renders (green bars for Ali Test and Ali)
Frontend: Jobs detail table shows 'İş' column
Frontend: Jobs detail table shows 'Makine' column
Frontend: Jobs detail table shows 'Operatör' column
Frontend: Jobs detail table shows 'Koli' column
Frontend: Jobs detail table shows 'Süre' column
Frontend: Jobs table shows 'Parla' job with 50 koli, 507s 22dk duration
Frontend: Jobs table shows 'Panorama' job with 50 koli, 3s 18dk duration
Frontend: Dialog closes with Escape key

components.summary_cards: 6 cards (total_koli, completed_jobs, started_jobs, operators, partial_koli, defects)
components.jobs_table: Table with İş, Makine, Operatör, Koli, Süre columns

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data from 2026-03-31 (100 koli, 2 jobs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Analytics Drill-Down feature fully tested. The dialog opens when clicking on a bar in the 'Günlük Üretim' chart within the Analiz tab. Data exists for 2026-03-31 (100 koli, 2 completed jobs by Ali and Ali Test on 33x33 ICM machine). Navigate to week '30 Mar 2026 - 05 Apr 2026' using the ← button to see the data bar on Tuesday (Sal). The dialog shows summary cards, machine pie chart, operator horizontal bar chart, and jobs detail table. All data-testid attributes work correctly: daily-detail-title, daily-detail-content, daily-detail-jobs-table.
